title: Apple unveils updated lineup ahead of fall event
description: Apple previewed several product updates expected to ship later this year, with analysts watching for impact on services revenue.

title: Microsoft cloud unit posts steady growth
description: Microsoft's cloud division continued to expand, with enterprise demand for AI-linked services cited as a key driver.

title: Tesla deliveries beat estimates for the quarter
description: Tesla reported delivery numbers ahead of analyst expectations, sending shares higher in early trading.
